name_en: Top-tier replica [Exclusive photo M82333 Yellow] This Rosalie coin purse features Monogram canvas and bright grain leather lining, with a compact structure that hides ample space. It includes a fan-style divider, card slots, and a coin pocket with a leather pull tab.
name_cn:
Top-tier replica [Exclusive photo M82333 Yellow] This Rosalie coin purse features Monogram canvas and bright grain leather lining, with a compact structure that hides ample space. It includes a fan-style divider, card slots, and a coin pocket with a leather pull tab.
size: 11x8x2.5cm
